accurate.why: All claims align with the bill text; Department of the Interior correctly administers the National Mall via the National Park Service.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; referring to the agency as the Department of the Interior is accurate context.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the resolution's purpose to request authorization of semiquincentennial displays on the National Mall.

changes_to_existing_law.why: This resolution merely makes a request and does not amend, repeal, or add to existing law.

exceptions_conditions.why: Omits the material condition that displays are 'unique and one-time arrangements' for 5 nights of public display.

effective_dates.why: States the December 31, 2025 to January 5, 2026 display period.

major_provisions_covered.why: Omits the explicit projection onto the Washington Monument and the request to transmit enrolled copies to the Secretary and Commission Chair.

objective_tone.why: The summary is neutral and free of editorializing.

coherent.why: The summary is clear and well-organized.

concise.why: The summary is concise with no padding or filler.

correct_entities.why: The Department of the Interior and National Mall are correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: The stated dates match the bill text exactly.
